hunt.offer: Websites + AI booking/ordering for businesses with no web presence
hunt.source: OpenStreetMap no-website pull → every lead hand-verified via live web search

prospects.name: La Costa del Sol
prospects.title: Ask for: Owner
prospects.reason: Busy, well-reviewed pupusa spot with NO website — only Facebook + third-party menu listings. Prime build target with clear demand.
prospects._hook: 112+ Yelp reviews, women-owned, famous for pupusas — but no site of their own
signals: 📵 No website — only a Facebook page (facebook.com/702pupusas) and 3rd-party menu listings
112+ Yelp reviews, active as of June 2026 — real demand, no owned web presence to capture it
Women-owned Salvadoran spot at 2208 S Nellis Blvd — orders/reservations all go through the phone
prospects.lifeEvent: Verified open June 2026 (Yelp); customers find them only via Facebook/Yelp — no site, no online ordering.

outreach.angle: The missing website IS the pitch. They have proven demand (112+ reviews) but no place to send it. Offer a simple site + online ordering so they stop losing phone-only orders.
outreach.opener: Hi — I noticed La Costa del Sol doesn't have a website yet, even with 100+ great reviews. That's exactly what I build — a clean site with online ordering. Mind if I send over a quick free mockup of what it'd look like?
outreach.dm: Hey! Love the pupusas reputation — noticed you're Facebook-only with no website. I build simple sites + online ordering for spots like yours. Can I send a free mockup?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about getting La Costa del Sol a real website with online ordering. I'll text you a free mockup so you can see it. Thanks!

followups.text: Call (702) 457-5255 — offer a free homepage mockup.
Send/text the mockup + a 1-line note on online ordering revenue.
Nudge: 'Want me to make it live this week?'
Break-up note + leave the mockup with them.

prospects.name: In Da Cut Barber
prospects.title: Ask for: Owner / Lead Barber
prospects.reason: Established Henderson barbershop (200+ reviews) running on Facebook + Booksy with no website of its own — strong fit for a branded site + AI booking.
prospects._hook: 200+ Yelp reviews, walk-in friendly, but only on Booksy/Facebook — no owned site
signals: 📵 No website — booking lives on Booksy/Fresha, presence on Facebook only
200+ Yelp reviews, verified open June 2026 — busy shop with no branded home base
2831 N Green Valley Pkwy, Henderson — walk-in friendly, rents chairs (multi-barber = booking upside)
prospects.lifeEvent: Verified open June 2026; relies on third-party booking platforms and Facebook, owns no website.

outreach.angle: They pay Booksy and don't own their web presence. Pitch a branded site + AI booking/reminders so they capture clients directly and cut no-shows — owned, not rented.
outreach.opener: Hey — saw In Da Cut has 200+ reviews but no website, just Booksy. I build barbershops a branded site with AI booking + text reminders so you own your clients instead of renting them. Want a free mockup?
outreach.dm: In Da Cut's reputation is solid — noticed there's no website, just booking apps. I set shops up with their own site + AI booking. Can I send a quick mockup?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about getting In Da Cut its own website with booking built in. I'll text a free mockup. Talk soon.

followups.text: Call (702) 405-8200 — offer free mockup, mention cutting no-shows with AI reminders.
Text the mockup + booking demo link.
Nudge: 'Want it live before the weekend rush?'

prospects.name: Universal Fade Kings
prospects.title: Ask for: Owner
prospects.reason: 20-year barbershop with a strong Instagram following but no website — books through thecut.co. Good fit for an owned site + AI booking.
prospects._hook: 20+ years serving the community, active Instagram, but no website
signals: 📵 No website — Instagram (@universalfadekings) + Facebook, booking via thecut.co only
20+ years in business, verified open April 2026 — loyal base, no owned web home
3242 E Desert Inn Rd #7 — established multi-barber shop, strong visual content on IG to anchor a site
prospects.lifeEvent: Verified open 2026; 20+ year shop building on Instagram with no website of its own.

outreach.angle: They have great IG content but no site to convert it. Pitch a simple site that pulls their Instagram + AI booking, so 20 years of reputation finally has a home base they own.
outreach.opener: Hey — Universal Fade Kings' Instagram is 🔥 but there's no website to send people to. I build barbershops a site that pulls your IG in + handles booking. Want a free mockup?
outreach.dm: 20 years and the IG looks great — noticed no website though. I set shops up with their own site + AI booking that feeds off your Instagram. Can I send a quick mockup?
outreach.voicemail: Hi, it's {you} — quick one about giving Universal Fade Kings a real website to match that Instagram. I'll DM a free mockup.

followups.text: Send mockup that embeds their IG feed + booking.
